title: Completed Tasks group: Sort by most recent on top?
excerpt:

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there anyway to automatically add newly moved tasks to the top of a group?

We have a “Completed” group that when a task status is marked Completed it moves here. I would like for the most recent task to be added to the TOP of the Completed group. Default is to add it to the bottom.

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DrGerry ,

You could create a date column that is filled in via automation “When Item moves to Completed, set Completion Date to today”. Then you can have a board view saved with a filter that sorts by completion date.

There may be a more straight forward way to accomplish this, but this could work if no one else in the community has a more simple solution.
